name: Merge Sorted Array
description: You are given two integer arrays nums1 and nums2, sorted in non-decreasing order, and two integers m and n representing the number of elements in nums1 and nums2 respectively. Merge nums2 into nums1 as one sorted array in-place. nums1 has length m + n, where the last n elements are set to 0 and should be ignored. Hint: use two pointers starting from the end.
constraints: nums1.length == m + n. nums2.length == n. 0 <= m, n <= 200. 1 <= m + n <= 200.
python_template:
